base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of pac_man_death — a character from 1980 pac man. Iconic 11-frame death animation — circle opens into a wider and wider wedge facing up, rotating clockwise. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Iconic 11-frame death animation — circle opens into a wider and wider wedge facing up, rotating clockwise; at peak, the shape collapses into a small triangle, then a flash-star, then vanishes. Played on ghost-contact; freezes game for ~1 second
